subject: St. Thomas to Paris options
body:
Option #1
St. Thomas - Santa Maria (Acores) (2368  miles) 4+43 min (wind +64 kts).
Santa Maria - Paris 3+03 min (1398 miles) (wind  +23 kts).
TOTAL  flight time 7+46 min  (not  including 1 hour on the ground for fuel).
 
Option #2
St. Thomas - Santiago SPAIN (3198 miles)  6+29  min (wind +66 kts). (need 
perfect weather for this stop).
Santiago - Paris 1+21 min (580 miles) (wind +29  kts).
Total Flight Time 7+50 min    (not  including 1 hour on the ground for fuel).
 



**************Planning your summer road trip? Check out AOL Travel Guides.    
  (http://travel.aol.com/travel-guide/united-states?ncid=aoltrv00030000000016)
